resources.string:
Last Updated: March 2026

 Welcome to Booky! We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.

 1. Information We Collect
 - Profile Information: When you log in via Google, we collect your name, email, and profile picture.
 - Contact Information: For mobile logins, we collect your phone number to verify your account.
 - Booking Data: We store information about your bus seat bookings to provide you with tickets and history.

 2. How We Use Your Data
 - To provide and maintain our service.
 - To notify you about changes to your bookings.
 - To provide customer support.

 3. Data Storage
 Your data is securely stored in Firebase (Google Cloud). We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

 4. Security
 The security of your data is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

 5. Contact Us
 If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@aurasoft.com.

By using the Booky mobile application, you agree to the following terms and conditions:

 1. Acceptance of Terms
 By accessing this app, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these terms.

 2. Booking and Payments
 - All bookings made through the app are subject to seat availability.
 - Ticket prices are determined by the bus operators and are subject to change.
 - Users must provide accurate information when booking.

 3. Cancellation and Refunds
 - Cancellation policies vary by bus operator. Please check before booking.
 - Refund processing may take 3-5 working days depending on your payment method.

 4. User Responsibilities
 - You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.
 - You agree not to use the app for any fraudulent or illegal activities.

 5. Limitation of Liability
 Booky is a platform to connect passengers with bus services. We are not responsible for bus delays, breakdowns, or service issues caused by the transport operators.

 6. Modifications
 We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the app signifies your acceptance of the new terms.
